narrative:
Precinct Mount Vernon 1-C (precinct in Knox County) has 868 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
